mutation_diagnostics.trigger_pattern: reset is asserted while enable is high
mutation_diagnostics.diagnostic_pattern: P_RESET_DISABLE_CLEAR mismatch_count>0 with sample_time, expected, observed, metric_gap, and fault_class=missing_reset

mutation_diagnostics.trigger_pattern: vin is below vref plus dropout
mutation_diagnostics.diagnostic_pattern: P_DROPOUT_CLAMP mismatch_count>0 with sample_time, expected, observed, metric_gap, and fault_class=wrong_polarity
P_CURRENT_LIMITING mismatch_count>0 with sample_time, expected, observed, metric_gap, and fault_class=wrong_gain

mutation_diagnostics.trigger_pattern: the regulator is enabled in dropout or overload
mutation_diagnostics.diagnostic_pattern: P_REGULATION_FLAG mismatch_count>0 with sample_time, expected, observed, metric_gap, and fault_class=qualification_error

mutation_diagnostics.trigger_pattern: normal enabled operation has adequate headroom
mutation_diagnostics.diagnostic_pattern: P_NORMAL_REGULATION mismatch_count>0 with sample_time, expected, observed, metric_gap, and fault_class=wrong_target
